scripts.prebuild: tsx scripts/generate-search-index.mts && tsx scripts/optimize-images.mts && tsx scripts/render-mermaid.mts && tsx scripts/generate-blog-stats.mts && tsx scripts/generate-tag-graph.mts && tsx scripts/generate-photo-gallery.mts && tsx scripts/validate-pulse-snapshot.mts
scripts.test:pulse-core: npm run -w @blog/pulse-core test && npm run -w @blog/pulse-core typecheck && npm run -w @blog/pulse-core validate:proto
scripts.test:pulse-client: npm run -w @blog/pulse-client test && npm run -w @blog/pulse-client typecheck
scripts.check: tsx scripts/generate-search-index.mts && tsx scripts/validate-pulse-snapshot.mts && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.security:audit:static: npm audit --omit=dev --workspaces=false && npm audit --omit=dev --workspace @blog/pulse-core && npm audit --omit=dev --workspace @blog/pulse-client
scripts.lint: eslint src/lib packages/blog-agent/src packages/blog-agent/test packages/pulse-core/src packages/pulse-core/test packages/pulse-client/src packages/pulse-client/test --max-warnings 0
